maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

language.title: Programming language
language.description: Filter by programming language. Examples: `python`, `typescript`, `rust`, `go`. Leave empty for all languages.
language.sectionDescription: GitHub trending lists 25 repos per page. Use these filters to narrow the trending feed.

spokenLanguage.title: Spoken language
spokenLanguage.description: Filter by README spoken language code (e.g. `en`, `zh`, `ja`, `ko`). Leave empty for any.

enrichWithApi.title: Enrich with GitHub API
enrichWithApi.description: When enabled, each trending repo is queried via api.github.com to add full stats: license, default branch, open issues, watchers, topics, push date, etc.
